---
title: "Custom styling and export"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Custom styling and export}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
```

# Custom styling and export

This vignette is a Phase 0 stub. Phase 7 will fill it with the
`vennDiagramLab` walkthrough described in the package design spec.

```{r}
library(vennDiagramLab)
vdl_version()
```
